data.title: This Budget US Airline Is Offering A 'GoWild' Pass: Catch Unlimited Flights For A Year At $299
data.description: Eligibility for the pass requires users to be at least 18 years old, U.S. residents, and members of Frontier Miles, the airline's loyalty program.

Palantir Strengthens Army Partnership, Adds AI And Data Enhancements In $618.9 Million Contract
data.description: Palantir extends partnership with U.S. Army, valued at $400.7M over 4 years. Aims to integrate data & AI capabilities across entire Army.
